The '''Panto system''', also known as the '''Pantolomin system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. It centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Panto]]. [[Planet/Legends|Planets]] in the system included its primary, [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]], and also [[Toloran]], and [[Atloran]].

The entire system operated as a resort for [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] travelers.

{{System-stub}}
